hero.title: Hire Trusted MIRYA Experts to Build Smarter Automation
hero.description: Connect with MIRYA-certified professionals who design, implement, and scale intelligent workflows tailored to your business.

miryaExperts.title: Meet MIRYA Experts
miryaExperts.desc: Work with a curated group of MIRYA-certified experts who deliver reliable, real-world automation solutions.

card1.title: Haider Solutions
card1.disc: Haider Solutions is a specialized automation and digitalization partner focused on process consulting, workflow optimization, and intelligent automation implementation.

card2.title: avy.solutions
card2.disc: avy.solutions is an international technology consultancy dedicated to intelligent process automation and digital transformation. Their team helps organizations automate repetitive tasks, streamline operations, and enhance efficiency.

becomeExpert.title: Become a MIRYA Expert
becomeExpert.desc: Join MIRYA’s official expert network and deliver trusted automation services to customers worldwide.

card1.title: Who Should Apply
card1.disc: Professionals and organizations with strong automation experience, including consultants, agencies, system integrators, and industry specialists building real-world automation solutions.

card2.title: Why Partner with MIRYA
card2.disc: Gain official MIRYA expert recognition, access qualified customers, build credibility, and grow your services with platform enablement and training.

card3.title: Expectations & Standards
card3.disc: Demonstrate automation expertise, follow MIRYA delivery guidelines, maintain professional standards, and participate in onboarding and quality reviews.

whenHire.title: When to Hire an Expert
points: You are starting automation and want a strong foundation.
Your workflows are complex, data-heavy, or business-critical.
You need custom automation beyond basic workflows.
You want to scale automation faster and avoid trial-and-error.

miniCard.title: Looking to Hire an expert?
miniCard.disc: Get connected with MIRYA-certified experts who can design, implement, and scale automation tailored to your needs.

work.title: How it Works
work.disc: A simple, guided process that connects you with the right MIRYA expert and takes you from requirement to delivery efficiently.

process1.title: Browse Experts
process1.disc: Explore MIRYA-certified experts by expertise, industry, and region to find the best match for your automation needs.

process2.title: Request an Introduction
process2.disc: Share your requirements and goals, and we’ll connect you with the most suitable MIRYA expert.

process3.title: Build & Deliver
process3.disc: Collaborate directly with the expert to design, implement, and deploy reliable, production-ready automation workflows.

services.title: Professional services for high impact automation
services.disc: Whether you're launching your first workflow or scaling automation across your organization, MIRYA’s specialists provide the expertise and support to guide you every step of the way.

card1.title: Process Guardian
card1.disc: Process guardian is a hands-on support service where MIRYA experts guide you through designing, building.

card2.title: 2-Day MIRYA Starter Training
card2.disc: A focused, instructor-led training experience designed to help your team master MIRYA in just two days.

card3.title: Compliance & Governance Setup
card3.disc: We set up secure, governed automation with roles, audit logs, versioning, and failover.

card4.title: 2-day MIRYA Expert Training
card4.disc: Advanced training for building complex, scalable workflows with logic and integrations.

card5.title: AI Consulting
card5.disc: Our AI experts provide tailored consulting to identify automation potential and design AI-driven workflows.

card1.title: Automation Discovery Workshop
card1.disc: We analyze processes, identify automation opportunities, and build an ROI-driven automation roadmap.

card2.title: Automation Center of Excellence (CoE) Setup
card2.disc: We help companies build internal automation teams with clear roles, governance, and scaling plans.

card3.title: Process Recording & Blueprinting
card3.disc: We document real user workflows and turn them into automation-ready blueprints—ideal for teams without documentation.

card4.title: Priority Support & Dedicated Success Manager
card4.disc: Guaranteed SLAs, fast response times, and a dedicated success manager ensuring smooth, continuously improving automation.

card5.title: MIRYA Proof of Value (4 weeks)
card5.disc: We deliver a working automation in four weeks, proving measurable value before long-term commitment.
